goal: Harden the createAgent session/checkpointer/approval resume story with stronger end-to-end contract evidence.
successCriteria: The mainline resumable agent story has dedicated e2e-style evidence covering interrupt, approval decision, resume, and persisted thread state.
The new evidence path is tied to the mainline createAgent contract rather than a side-path runtime fixture.
Focused verification proves the resumable story remains stable after the Wave A sessionStore contract changes.
touchedSurfaces: createAgent resumable thread flow and approval resume contract
runtime-hardening e2e or story-level verification for session/checkpointer behavior
runtime docs or test artifacts needed to explain the supported mainline flow
explicitlyOutOfScope: Introducing a new runtime facade unrelated to the current createAgent mainline
Changing MCP host boundaries beyond what the resumable story consumes
integrationPrerequisites: Wave B foundation/export-coverage-guard is integrated on codex/vnext-integration as 23e8fb9.
Wave A runtime mainline contract remains the baseline; do not re-open sessionStore shape without evidence.

liveVerifyStatus.reason: This package strengthens local contract and e2e evidence for runtime resume behavior; live credentials are not required.
